text.title: Story Authoring with CSF 3
text.summary: CSF 3 story shape: satisfies Meta, StoryObj, tags autodocs, argTypes for controls, play functions for interaction tests, MDX docs blocks.

rule.statement: Use `satisfies Meta<typeof Component>` for the meta object and `StoryObj<typeof meta>` for stories. Always add `tags: ['autodocs']` to generate a docs page.
rule.rationale: satisfies provides stronger type inference than a direct type annotation; without tags: ['autodocs'] no documentation page appears in Storybook 8.

rule.statement: Always await every userEvent call inside a play function. Use step() for multi-step interactions to produce readable test reports.
rule.rationale: userEvent is async; without await the DOM update has not happened when expect() runs, producing flaky assertion failures.
